title: helichrysum gradatum
intro: Helichrysum gradatum, also known as yellow mountain paperflower or mountain everlast, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum gradatum include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its health benefits.
